label: 贴面摆放
description: 把 child 部件贴到 parent 的某个轴对齐外表面（+x/-x/+y/-y/+z/-z）上，输出新的 Geometry（child 的 origin 已写回）；同时给出 ox/oy/oz 三个数。proud 沿法向突出/嵌入；face_u / face_v 是面内偏移。
description-en: Place child on a parent's axis-aligned face (+x/-x/+y/-y/+z/-z). Outputs a new Geometry with the child's origin rewritten, plus the raw ox/oy/oz numbers. proud = normal-direction protrusion; face_u/face_v are in-face offsets.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（必须含两个 part）

inputs.name: parent_id
inputs.label: 父部件 id
inputs.description: 父 part id；也可以填 shape id（box/cylinder/...）—— 没有 part 包它时会自动隐式补一行 part
inputs.description-en: Parent part id; or a shape id (box/cylinder/…) — an implicit `part(shape=ref(id))` is auto-appended if none wraps it.

inputs.name: child_id
inputs.label: 子部件 id
inputs.description: 子 part id（其 origin 会被改写）；同样支持填 shape id，必要时自动包裹
inputs.description-en: Child part id (its origin will be rewritten). Shape id is also accepted with auto-wrap fallback.

inputs.name: proud
inputs.label: 突出 (m)
inputs.description: 沿法向额外突出（>0）或嵌入（<0），单位米
inputs.description-en: Extra protrusion along normal in meters (negative = sink into parent).

inputs.name: face_u
inputs.label: 面内 U (m)
inputs.description: 面内 U 方向偏移

inputs.name: face_v
inputs.label: 面内 V (m)
inputs.description: 面内 V 方向偏移

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 改写过 child.origin 后的新 Geometry，可直接接 g_to_urdf / g_preview
outputs.description-en: New Geometry with the child's origin rewritten; pipe directly to g_to_urdf / g_preview.
